qualifications.degree_row_2: Associate of Applied Science in Office Administration

special_skills.special_skills_or_experience_line_1: Fluent in English and conversational Vietnamese; routinely assist my parents and extended family with translating medical documents, insurance paperwork, and appointment instructions, which has made me very comfortable explaining complex information in clear, everyday language to people who may be anxious or unfamiliar with the healthcare system.
special_skills.special_skills_or_experience_line_2: Proficient with Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint), Google Workspace, and electronic medical record systems similar to Epic; in my current role I manage a shared inbox of 80–100 patient messages per day, maintain multiple shared calendars for three providers, and create detailed Excel tracking sheets for referral status and follow-up tasks.
special_skills.special_skills_or_experience_line_3: Strong customer service and de-escalation skills developed through three years at a busy front desk: I regularly handle patients who are frustrated about scheduling delays or insurance issues by listening carefully, acknowledging their concerns, clearly explaining options, and involving a nurse or manager when necessary, while still maintaining HIPAA compliance and a calm, welcoming lobby environment.

references.reference_1_address_city_state: Evergreen Family Clinic, 2335 SE Hawthorne Blvd, Portland, OR 97214
references.reference_1_relationship: Current supervisor; Clinic Office Manager at Evergreen Family Clinic, has supervised my work directly since March 2022.
references.reference_2_relationship: Former coworker at Evergreen Family Clinic; worked side by side at the front desk for approximately two years.
references.reference_3_address_city_state: Portland Community College, 12000 SW 49th Ave, Portland, OR 97219
references.reference_3_relationship: Former college instructor and academic advisor in the Office Administration program; can speak to my coursework, reliability, and technical skills.
